title: Sharown #8289
definition:
n m
 1) plain, level

 Sharon = "a plain"

 n pr loc
 2) the district lying between the mountains of central Palestine and
    the Mediterranean Sea and north of Joppa
 3) a district on the east of the Jordan around Gilead and Bashan
nasbUsage:
Definition: n m
 1) plain, level

 Sharon = "a plain"

 n pr loc
 2) the district lying between the mountains of central Palestine and
    the Mediterranean Sea and north of Joppa
 3) a district on the east of the Jordan around Gilead and Bashan

    NASB:  a plain on the Mediterranean Sea, perh. also a region E. of the Jordan
